content.en:
Taisu Palace suddenly increased three sevenfold to the Dao realm, and the strength of the coalition army skyrocketed.

In this way, the Sevenfold Dao Realm of the Infinite Heavenly Palace was inferior to them, and once they fought again, they would inevitably fall into disadvantage, and some of the Sevenfold Dao Realm would even be besieged.

If there were seven supreme Dao realms to slaughter six supreme Dao realms, it would be even more troublesome.

Unless they retreat to the headquarters of the Infinite Heavenly Palace and give up other territories.

But in that case, they wouldn't want to leave the Infinite Heavenly Palace, and they could only retreat into this small area.

So.

Six Crying Heavenly Venerables, they are all discussing what to do at the moment?

"Six Cry Heavenly Venerable, you are the most powerful among us, what should I do now?"

A Celestial Venerable asked.

Liuqi Tianzun frowned, and only spoke for a long time: "Two ways, the first is to fight to the death, and the second is to negotiate peace!"

"Peace Talks????

Many Heavenly Venerables were puzzled.

They have all fought to this extent, and both sides have suffered heavy casualties, can they still negotiate peace?

Liuqi Tianzun sneered: "Don't forget, why do the forces of Taisu Palace and others want to rebel, it is not because the calamity is coming, when the time comes, the Innate Origin Domain Alliance will inevitably let us send a large number of Dao Realms to the Infinite Domain, and they are worried that they will become cannon fodder, so they will resist."

Now, there are still more than 20,000 years to the Dao Era before the catastrophe, which is not a long time. If we retreat in the Infinite Heavenly Palace and open the formation, they will not be able to break through our Infinite Heavenly Palace.

Once the calamity comes, the Innate Origin Domain Alliance will inevitably send an Eightfold Dao Realm to urge, and at that time, the Taisu Palace will inevitably send the Sevenfold Dao Realm to the past. Of course, we will definitely also be pulled away from a part of the Sevenfold Dao Realm. At that point, they will all want to live, and how can they have time to deal with us?

In terms of the number of the Sevenfold Dao Realm, we are the most powerful single forces, and Taisu Palace can only compete with us by combining with other forces, and when the time comes, we can counterattack them. "

Another Heavenly Venerable nodded again and again: "That's right, the Innate Origin Domain Alliance allows our major forces to come out of the Sevenfold Realm and the Sevenfold Realm to the Dao Realm, it must be calculated according to one force by one, even if we count half of the Sevenfold Realm to the Dao Realm, it is a lot, and some of them have some forces, and they can estimate all the Sevenfold Realm to the Dao Realm, how can they compete with us?"

Liuqi Tianzun nodded: "So, it is they who are anxious at that time, not us, if we make peace with them, discuss it, they will definitely agree, and our Wuji Heavenly Palace will naturally be able to save it!"

The Six Cry Heavenly Venerables also thought about not negotiating peace, so they waited for the catastrophe to come, but Taisu Palace would definitely kill all the other Dao realms outside the Wuji Heavenly Palace at all costs, leaving only the headquarters of the Wuji Heavenly Palace.

In that case, their family and their descendants will probably die.

There are too many supreme realms in the Wuji Heavenly Palace, and the territory is too large, so it is impossible to bring them all into the Wuji Heavenly Palace in a short period of time.

Moreover, even if they were brought in, the Taisu Palace would continue to attack, and the power that would come in from the shock alone would be enough to kill the ordinary Dao realm, so that their powerful sevenfold supreme Dao realm and those sixfold supreme Dao realms could survive.

Therefore, it is better to negotiate peace.

......

Taisu Palace.

The Taisu Palace Master received a summons from the Wuji Heavenly Palace.

"Peace talks?"

The Taisu Palace Lord sneered.

With the arrogance of the Wuji Heavenly Palace, it was originally impossible to negotiate peace, but now that the Taisu Palace has added three new sevenfold to the Dao realm, the Wuji Heavenly Palace is afraid, so it is ready to negotiate peace.

Then.

Another sevenfold Dao realm from Taisu Palace said: "Taisu, we have a greater advantage now, there is no need to negotiate peace." "

However, there are also Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realms who said: "Although we have a greater advantage, they also have a lot of Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realms, if they shrink into the Infinite Heavenly Palace, we will at most occupy all the territory of the Infinite Heavenly Palace, and kill all their ordinary Dao Realms, they can still hide in the headquarters of the Infinite Heavenly Palace." If the calamity comes after more than 20,000 Dao eras, what should I do?"

Disaster!

When many of the Sevenfold Dao Realms heard this, their faces immediately turned unpleasant.

They rebelled not because of calamity.

With the style of the Wuji Heavenly Palace in the past, he would inevitably come out of the Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm by himself, push them out of these Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realms, and let them be used as cannon fodder.

In the midst of the tribulation, the Sevenfold Dao Realm is just top-notch cannon fodder, and the possibility of its fall is too great.

Not only the sevenfold supreme realm, but also a large number of triple and higher supreme realm realms are needed.

At that time, these forces are estimated to exist in name only.

Even if they fall, but the power is preserved, they are willing!

Therefore, they don't want to be killed by the Wuji Heavenly Palace.

At this time, the master of Taisu Palace said: "If they retreat in the Wuji Heavenly Palace, if we retaliate, we can only kill all the Supreme Dao Realm under their command, but if we can kill them all, as soon as the calamity comes, we will have to send our Supreme Dao Realm over to be used as cannon fodder." Therefore, if they make peace talks and make some demands, if they agree, it is not impossible to stop. "

"What conditions?"

The other sevenfold to the Dao realm is curious.

The master of the Taisu Palace said: "For example, once the calamity comes, they have to send more than seventy percent of the threefold to the Dao realm, including the level of the sevenfold to the Dao realm, and they must make a supreme dao oath. In addition, we have to compensate for a large number of resources and treasures, as well as a part of the territory. Not only that, but it was also necessary to recognize the Xuantian Alliance as the dominant position in the Infinite Domain. Only by acknowledging our dominance can we have the right to speak, and we can speak with the Infinite Origin Alliance. "

The Xuantian Alliance is an alliance led by forces such as Taisu Palace.

"This request, they will agree to ???"

The other Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realms felt that they would definitely not agree.

"Ask for it first, it's their business to agree or not, anyway, reply like this first!" said the Taisu Palace Master.

Subsequently.

The request for peace talks from Taisu Palace has been summoned.

really

When these Sevenfold Heavenly Venerables of the Infinite Heavenly Palace heard this, they were immediately extremely annoyed.

If you agree, the Wuji Heavenly Palace will inevitably suffer heavy losses, how can it compete with the Taisu Palace at that time?

In the following days, Taisu Palace and Wuji Heavenly Palace communicated and talked many times, but each time they did not negotiate well.

And without peace talks, Taisu Palace continued to invade Wuji Heavenly Palace, and the three newly promoted Sevenfold Realms such as the Longqin Palace Master also attacked one after another, killing many Sixfold Dao Realms, making the territory of Wuji Heavenly Palace continue to shrink.

this day.

Taisu Palace gave birth to another Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm, which was made by using the remaining Seventh Sequence Supreme Dao Rule items to break through by luck.

Originally, this person had not yet comprehended the eighth-sequence supreme rules, but with the help of pieces of seventh-sequence supreme dao rule items, he was forcibly promoted.
